## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally (`npx astro check`)
- [ ] Internal links are valid
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or sensitive data are exposed
- [ ] Content follows the [Documentation Standards](./src/content/docs/documentation-standards.mdx)
- [ ] Frontmatter includes a `title` (and `description` where appropriate)
